notes: eBay picking list now falls back to the SKU-embedded location (eBay SKU convention 'U<id> - <location>', e.g. 'U2222 - Garage - E1') when the matched inventory item has no storage_location, rendered as 'Garage - E1 (from SKU)'. Inventory storage_location always wins when present because the SKU records the at-listing location and can be stale. Fully unmatched line items also get a pickable location but stay in the unmatched warning. No DB backfill of storage_location (1,517 of 1,819 pattern-SKU eBay items lack it; backfilling would write stale at-listing locations as current truth). SQL simulation of the deployed logic confirms the triggering item (8531 BIONICLE Pohatu, order 10-14754-53645) resolves to 'Garage - E1 (from SKU)'.
